title: crataegus pseudoheterophylla subsp. turkestanica
intro: Crataegus pseudoheterophylla subsp. turkestanica, also known as Turkestan Hawthorn, is a subspecies of the Crataegus pseudoheterophylla plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family of flowering plants. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids, tannins, and organic acids, which are known to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardioprotective effects. The health benefits of Turkestan Hawthorn include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of heart failure and other cardiovascular diseases. Turkestan Hawthorn can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
